title: Trash: Delete and Recover
drDigitalIntro: When you don't need a file anymore, you move it to the Trash. But here's the good news: deleting a file sends it to the Trash, where it waits — so if you delete something by accident, you can put it back. Let's delete a file, then rescue it.

playgroundTask.goal: Delete a file, then recover it from the Trash

steps.say: Let's delete a file. Click TaxReturn.pdf to select it, then click Move to Trash.
Oops — we still need it! Click Trash in the sidebar, click TaxReturn.pdf, then click Put Back.

drDigitalSuccess: You deleted a file AND rescued it from the Trash. Now you'll never panic about deleting something by accident!
drDigitalHint: First select the file and click Move to Trash. Then open Trash in the sidebar, select the file, and click Put Back.
